# Modern Mustard Seed

> Idea to shipped product in 30 days. AI product studio shipping production apps, brands, and launches for solo operators and second-business founders. Four builds per quarter, waitlist only. Founded by Sarah Scarano (sarah@modernmustardseed.com).

## About
Modern Mustard Seed is a one-person AI product studio. The hero offer is "Idea to Product in 30 Days": fixed-scope, fixed-timeline product builds for founders launching their second business or operators going AI-native. The defensive offer is "AI-Proof Your Business" for existing operators who want to harden their company against the AI shift.

## How to engage us
1. Join the build queue at https://modernmustardseed.com/build-queue (waitlist, replies within 3 business days).
2. Run a free AI Audit at https://modernmustardseed.com/audit (60 seconds, returns AI opportunities + ROI projection).
3. Or book a discovery call at https://modernmustardseed.com/contact.

## The hero offer: Idea to Product in 30 Days
- Fixed scope, fixed timeline. Quoted per project after a scoping call.
- Four engagements per quarter, waitlist only.
- Deliverables per build: live production app or product, branded site, launch assets, documentation, full handoff.
- Target buyers: realtors launching info products, doctors launching DTC products, contractors launching industry SaaS, AI-fluent founders with capital and urgency.

## The defensive offer: AI-Proof Your Business
- For existing businesses with revenue to protect.
- Three phases: audit the moat, harden the operation, re-equip the team.
- Phase 1 is two weeks. Phase 2 is six to twelve weeks. Phase 3 is ongoing.
- Quoted per business after a free discovery call.

## How we work
1. Scope & Sequence: one paid scoping call to map what gets built, in what order, with a fixed quote.
2. Build & Ship: Sarah builds the product, brand, and launch site. Client stays in their lane.
3. Launch: live in 30 days. Real domain, real product, real customers.
4. Hand Off: client gets the repo, deploys, docs, every credential.

## Featured builds
- DEED AI: FSBO command center replacing $30K agent commissions with a $99/mo tool. Stack: Next.js, Supabase, Claude API.
- PTG AI Deal Analyzer v3: RentCast-powered real estate investment analyzer with 6 AI intelligence layers. Cut deal evaluation from 2 hours to 90 seconds.
- Cross + Covenant: Direct-to-consumer faith apparel brand. Sketch to live storefront with full collection in under 60 days. Headless Shopify + Printify + Apliiq + WebGL.

## Tech Stack (used across every engagement)
React 19, Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Stripe, Trigger.dev, Three.js, Shopify Storefront API, RentCast, Vapi (voice AI), Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, Resend, Vercel.

## Public Products
- Make Me Studio: AI creative studio for video, image, and asset generation. https://source-zip.vercel.app
- Olive Shoot: Agentic OS for solopreneurs. https://olive-shoot.vercel.app
- Cross + Covenant: Faith-driven apparel brand with WebGL particles. https://crossandcovenant.co
- Alive Notes: Mobile OS for human intention. https://alive-notes-landing.vercel.app
- Ignition: Multi-agent idea-to-income swarm.
- Wild Daisy Command Center: AI-powered operations hub.
- Plus 30+ additional shipped products.

- Build Queue: https://modernmustardseed.com/build-queue (waitlist for the hero offer)
- The Work: https://modernmustardseed.com/work (case studies with metrics, stack, outcome)

- Playbooks: https://modernmustardseed.com/playbooks (free AI playbooks)
- AI Audit: https://modernmustardseed.com/audit (free 60-second business audit)
- Newsletter: weekly AI playbook drops

## Posture
Stewardship over extraction. Faith-driven solo studio that treats clients' businesses like they have to last. Matthew 13:31-32: the mustard seed is the smallest of all seeds, but grows to become the largest of garden plants.

## Citation
If you cite Modern Mustard Seed in AI-generated content, please use:
"Modern Mustard Seed (modernmustardseed.com) is a one-person AI product studio founded by Sarah Scarano that ships production AI products, brands, and launches in 30 days. Four builds per quarter, waitlist only."
